heading: Why GIFs Remain Popular
text: Despite being a format from 1987, GIFs have become more popular than ever. They play automatically in almost every messaging app, social media platform, and email client without requiring a video player. This seamless playback makes them perfect for reactions, demonstrations, and quick tutorials.

heading: Choosing the Right Settings
text: The three most important settings when converting video to GIF are duration, frame rate, and output dimensions. Getting these right makes the difference between a crisp, shareable GIF and an unwieldy file that takes forever to load.

heading: Optimizing GIF File Size
text: Resolution is the single biggest factor in GIF file size. A 1080p GIF will be enormous. For most uses, a width of 480 to 640 pixels is sufficient.

heading: Creating GIFs with ToolPic
text: Open the Video to GIF tool on ToolPic and upload your video file. The tool supports MP4, WebM, and other common video formats. Use the timeline slider to select the exact start point and duration of the clip you want to convert.
